Вам комфортно писать high-converting copy, настраивать tracking events и анализировать cohort retention. Вы используете GenAI для повышения своей продуктивности, а не вместо собственного мышления.

name: Senior/Lead Community Manager (PC / Console Project)
description: Nekki is a game development studio with over 20 years of experience. We create games for mobile, PC, and consoles , focusing on product quality and player experience. The Shadow Fight series and Vector have been downloaded over 1 billion times , and we continue to grow and support these franchises. At the same time, we’re building new titles: SPINE and Fight Me . We are currently looking for a Community Manager who will own the voice of SPINE across all platforms during the most critical phase of the project — the prerelease push SPINE is made with Unreal Engine 5 and centered around cinematic gun-fu shootouts. It's a third-person beat'em'up with a full set of PC gaming features , including a deep storyline, a unique setting, cutscenes, intriguing enemies, memorable bosses, character progression, and, most importantly, breathtaking battles with a wide array of firearms. Responsibilities: Generate content ideas and formats that serve the current marketing focus of the project: narrative, combat, pre-release milestones, etc. Maintain the content calendar across all platforms: topics, formats, timing, and platform specific logic Track performance metrics across platforms, draw conclusions, and adjust the content strategy based on data Write scripts for short-form videos (TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels) and brief video editors to execute them Write scripts and outlines for long-form YouTube content: gameplay breakdowns, character deep-dives, lore explainers Write Developer Blogs — editorial pieces that read like real content Manage daily communication and posting on Twitter/X, Steam, Reddit, and other platforms Run the SPINE Discord server: maintain channels, build engagement formats, create the feeling of an inner circle Drive game wishlisting as a core KPI Collect and structure feedback from the community and followers; bring it to the team in a usable form What we are looking for: Strong writing skills in both Russian and English Ability to write a video script from scratch: hook, structure, pacing, CTA Native understanding of short-form content — you know what works on TikTok and why English at C1 or above: community posts, outreach, and media communication without supervision Proactive and self-directed — you come with ideas, not just execution Would be a plus: Experience with Discord as a community product: building engagement, running events, exclusive formats You play games seriously — familiarity with the action genre is a real advantage Understanding of Steam as a marketing platform: Wishlist mechanics, Steam page, news updates Experience working with influencers or gaming press Live streaming experience: hosting, game commentary, community sessions We offer: A great team with a friendly and informal work environment (we share colleagues' interests, play video games together, and organize internal game jams) Support of professional development, participation in specialized conferences and educational events Remote work from all over the world Working hours from 10 AM to 7 PM (GMT+3) with possibility of adjustment Competitive salary (depending on professional qualifications)

name: Sportsbook Product Manager
description: N1 Partners continues to expand the team and is looking for a Sportsbook Product Manager . We need a true, experienced, and accomplished professional who shares our culture and values. Responsibilities: competitive analysis and market research; analysis of internal users' needs, insight search and trend-watching; formation of functional and product requirements for product development: conceptual optimization of existing features + formation of requests for the introduction of new features, formation of roadmap releases of new features; preparation of the product for new markets, supervising the development process and tracking deadlines together with Project Manager; defining of the internal and external marketing strategy of the product: analysis of the current target audience, search and evaluation of new potential markets; search for new channels to attract customers; calculation of the cost of attracting a client; defining and control of the budget for attracting new customers; customer segmentation, development of sales funnels; assessment of the dynamics of key KPIs (CR, RR, LTV, ARPU) of new and previously attracted customers; search and evaluation of the most effective channels of communication with customers. Requirements: 2+ years experience in sportsbook/betting operations; advanced English (B2 and higher); sociability; ability to work in multitasking mode; experience with CRM systems; experience with ESP. Working conditions: work in an international IT product company with offices in Poland, Georgia, Malta; remote full-time work or work from a comfortable office. It doesn't matter where you re working from, only the result is important; flexible schedule. It is enough to coordinate time zones and have intersections of working hours with the team; paid 4 Sick Days and 1 Day Off per calendar year; free online English lessons with a native speaker; large payments under the referral program, in which the bonus is received by both the employee who recommends and the candidate who accepts the offer; trainings, internal meetings, participation in international professional conferences and corporate events

name: B2B Marketing & Ads Manager / Менеджер по B2B-маркетингу и рекламе
description: Passionate Agency is a branding, web, graphic design, CRO and AI services agency looking for an experienced B2B Marketing & Ads Manager to join our team! We are looking for a results-driven marketing professional passionate about generating high-quality leads for tech and professional services companies, with a proven track record managing paid and organic campaigns targeting B2B audiences in the US and UK. The position is completely remote and applications from around the world are welcome. The applicant should be able to work during US and/or UK business hours. Your Responsibilities Will Include Plan, launch, and optimize paid campaigns across LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, and Meta Ads with a focus on B2B lead generation Develop and execute account-based marketing (ABM) strategies targeting high-value prospects Build and manage lead generation funnels for high-touch, high-value client engagements Manage and optimize campaign budgets to maximize ROI and cost-per-lead metrics Conduct keyword research and support SEO initiatives to drive organic lead generation Collaborate with content and design teams to develop compelling ad creatives and landing pages Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance using analytics tools Manage and maintain CRM data accuracy and lead tracking Leverage AI-native tools to automate and enhance campaign workflows and reporting Conduct audience research and segmentation to improve targeting and messaging Identify new channels and opportunities for B2B lead generation growth Stay up to date with the latest trends in B2B marketing, paid media, and AI-powered marketing automation Conduct competitor analysis and derive actionable insights to improve campaign performance Requirements Native or near-native (C1+) English knowledge At least 3 years of hands-on experience managing B2B paid media campaigns (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Meta Ads) Proven track record of generating high-quality leads for high-value B2B engagements Experience working with tech, SaaS, or professional services companies Strong understanding of SEO principles and their role in B2B lead generation Proficiency in analytics tools (Google Analytics, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Google Ads Manager) Experience with A/B testing of ad creatives, landing pages, and messaging AI-native mindset with hands-on experience using tools such as: n8n or similar workflow automation platforms (Make, Zapier) Claude, ChatGPT, or other LLMs for content and campaign ideation Claude Code or similar AI coding assistants for workflow automation AI-powered copywriting and creative tools Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with ability to derive insights from data Excellent organizational and time management skills Ability to work independently and manage multiple campaigns simultaneously Experience targeting B2B clients in the US and UK markets Preferred Qualifications Previous experience at a design, development, or marketing agency Familiarity with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) Familiarity with account-based marketing (ABM) platforms Google Ads and/or LinkedIn Marketing certifications Understanding of conversion rate optimization principles Experience with retargeting and lookalike audience strategies Knowledge of marketing attribution models Experience building automated reporting or lead nurturing workflows using n8n or similar tools Remuneration Highly competitive ------- Passionate Agency — агентство в сфере брендинга, веб-дизайна, графического дизайна, CRO и AI-решений. Мы ищем опытного B2B Marketing & Ads Manager, который сможет выстраивать и масштабировать кампании по генерации лидов для услуг агентства, в первую очередь в сегментах tech, digital и professional services. Это полностью удалённая позиция, и мы рассматриваем кандидатов из разных стран. Важно, чтобы кандидат мог работать в часы США и/или Великобритании. Обязанности Планировать, запускать и оптимизировать B2B performance-кампании с фокусом на лидогенерацию Самостоятельно вести рекламные кампании в LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads и Meta Ads Строить и улучшать воронки привлечения лидов для high-touch, high-value услуг Разрабатывать и тестировать аудитории, офферы, креативы и рекламные сообщения Работать с account-based marketing (ABM) и сегментацией целевой аудитории Анализировать эффективность кампаний, CPL, CAC, конверсии и качество лидов Сотрудничать с командой контента, дизайна и sales/business development для повышения результатов кампаний Участвовать в разработке и улучшении landing pages, lead magnets и рекламных материалов Поддерживать SEO-инициативы, включая keyword research и поиск возможностей для органического роста Настраивать, автоматизировать и улучшать маркетинговые процессы и отчётность Искать новые каналы роста, форматы кампаний и возможности масштабирования B2B lead generation Проводить конкурентный анализ и формировать рекомендации на основе данных Требования Английский язык на уровне C1 или выше От 3 лет практического опыта в B2B performance marketing / paid acquisition Подтверждённый опыт генерации качественных лидов для B2B-компаний Опыт работы с tech, SaaS, digital, consulting или professional services нишами будет большим плюсом Практический опыт ведения кампаний в LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads и Meta Ads Хорошее понимание B2B lead generation для сделок с длинным циклом продаж и высокой ценностью контракта Понимание основ SEO и его роли в системе генерации B2B-лидов Умение анализировать результаты кампаний и принимать решения на основе данных Опыт A/B тестирования рекламных сообщений, креативов, офферов и посадочных страниц Сильные аналитические навыки, внимательность к деталям и системный подход Умение самостоятельно вести несколько кампаний одновременно и соблюдать сроки AI-native навыки Нам особенно интересны кандидаты, которые уже активно используют AI в своей ежедневной работе. Будет плюсом опыт работы с: Claude, ChatGPT и другими LLM-инструментами n8n, Make, Zapier или другими платформами автоматизации Claude Code или аналогичными AI coding / workflow assistant инструментами AI-инструментами для генерации рекламных текстов, анализа данных, автоматизации отчётности и ускорения маркетинговых процессов Будет плюсом Опыт работы в агентстве, особенно с B2B-клиентами из США и Великобритании Понимание CRO, воронок конверсии и принципов улучшения landing pages Опыт работы с ABM-подходом Наличие сертификатов Google Ads / LinkedIn Ads Опыт настройки автоматизированных маркетинговых workflow Опыт работы с CRM-системами, такими как HubSpot, Salesforce или аналогичными платформами Понимание attribution и multi-touch marketing analytics Условия Полностью удалённая работа Конкурентная оплата Возможность работать с международными B2B-проектами Работа на стыке дизайна, CRO, AI и performance marketing Возможность влиять на рост агентства и выстраивать маркетинг системно

name: Channel Sales Manager / Partnership Manager
description: Привет! Мы развиваем международное направление продаж через партнёрскую сеть и ищем сильного Channel Sales / Partnership Manager, который поможет выстроить партнёрский канал с нуля, привлекать новых партнёров и увеличивать выручку через партнёрские продажи. Why SEO Serious — это перфоманс агентство, специализирующееся на SEO, ASO, mobile, ORM и веб-аналитике. Мы обладаем глубокой экспертизой в оптимизации сайтов и приложений как на российском, так и на международных рынках разных сфер (E-commerce, FinTech, EdTech, FoodTech и другие). Среди наших постоянных клиентов — такие известные компании, как Sunlight, Рольф, Burger King, Level Kitchen, Hobby Games, Лэтуаль, Skillbox и многие другие. Что делает нас уникальными? Мы работаем с крупным бизнесом и известными брендами на рынке. Наш подход — не просто предоставление услуг, а становление частью команды клиента. Погружение в бизнес клиентов позволяет достигать новых высот и реализовывать амбициозные цели. Мы из разных уголков мира, но нас объединяет единая цель: вместе реализовать крутые проекты! Присоединяйся к нам и расти вместе с Why SEO Serious! Чем предстоит заниматься: Развивать международную партнёрскую сеть и выстраивать партнёрские продажи с нуля; Искать и привлекать новые digital-агентства и другие B2B-компании для развития партнёрского канала через холодный поиск: LinkedIn, email-рассылки, профессиональные сообщества, конференции и другие каналы; Настраивать и автоматизировать рассылки через Expandi и аналогичные инструменты; Выходить на ЛПР, проводить переговоры и оценивать потенциал партнёров; Онбордить, обучать и развивать партнёров; Выстраивать долгосрочные отношения с партнёрами и поддерживать их активность; Управлять партнёрской воронкой и выполнять план продаж через партнёрский канал; Увеличивать выручку через партнёрский канал: формировать планы продаж с партнёрами, проводить account mapping и стратегию выхода на целевых клиентов. В тебе хочется видеть: От 3 лет опыта в Channel Sales / Partnership Management на международных рынках в IT/digital; Сильные навыки холодного поиска и привлечения партнёров; Понимание B2B-продаж, экономики агентского бизнеса и отличий партнёрских продаж от прямых; Умение находить релевантных партнёров и выстраивать с ними долгосрочные отношения; Навык построения цепочек касаний и выхода на ЛПР; Умение проводить выявление потребностей и квалификацию партнёров; Английский язык — C1, второй язык будет преимуществом. Будет плюсом: Опыт построения партнёрской программы с нуля; У нас: полностью удаленный формат работы, гибкое начало дня (+-час); оплачиваемый отпуск - 28 календарных дней в год; компенсация больничного - до 100%; компенсация медицинских расходов, спорта, английского языка и обучения; возможности для роста и развития; корпоративы и командные встречи в онлайн и оффлайн формате; нет - микроменеджменту, да - новым идеям, инициативе и самостоятельности; открытая, честная, прозрачная коммуникация в команде; топ-менеджмент на расстоянии одного сообщения.

name: Territory Sales Manager
description: An international FMCG (food) company is looking for Territory Sales Manager, Atyrau. We are looking for result-driven sales leader with strong people management and analytical skills, experienced in implementing company strategy, developing sales channels, leading and motivating teams, and driving business performance in a dynamic, multi-regional environment. Main Responsibilities: Implementation of the company’s strategy in Atyrau and Aktau, coordination of short-term and long-term objectives Identifying and activating new sales opportunities and channels Ability to effectively coordinate and motivate the sales team Maintaining close collaboration with the distributor to control inventory levels and service quality Participation in cross-functional projects within the company Requirements: Proficiency in MS Excel and other analytical tools Training and coaching skills Ability to allocate tasks and resources across regions People management skills Proactive approach Results-oriented mindset Decision-making in conditions of uncertainty Negotiation skills Strong communication skills Stress resilience and strong focus on results

name: Performance Marketing Operations Manager - Moving Company USA
description: About Us Service Pro Movers is a growing moving company serving the Sacramento, San Francisco, and San Jose areas in California. We're scaling our marketing operations and looking for an experienced, hands-on Marketing Manager to bring our digital marketing in-house taking ownership of strategy, vendor management, and execution across all our growth channels. About the Role The position does not require starting to build our marketing presence from the ground up. We currently work with outsourced specialists managing our Google Ads and local search campaigns. We're looking for an in-house Marketing Manager who deeply understands the U.S. digital advertising landscape, can manage and evaluate outsourced agencies/freelancers, and over time can bring more of this work directly in-house. Working hours are tied to California daytime. This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who can walk into existing campaigns, audit performance critically, ask the right questions of our vendors, and make decisions: not someone who needs to be taught the channels. !!! U.S. market experience is MANDATORY . You must understand how Americans search for and choose local services, how review platforms function in the U.S, and how to navigate U.S. specific ad platforms and compliance requirements. What You'll Be Responsible For • Paid Advertising & Local Ads: oversee our paid search and local advertising vendors, holding them accountable to ROI targets. • Local SEO & Google Business Profile: manage our listings across all three service areas and coordinate SEO work with vendors. • Reputation Management: own our review strategy across Yelp, Google, and other platforms, including responding to reviews and handling disputes. • Vendor & Agency Management: be the primary point of contact for all outsourced marketing vendors, evaluating performance and deciding what to bring in-house. • Analytics & Reporting: track marketing spend against lead volume and conversion data in SmartMoving, reporting on cost-per-lead and cost-per-booking. • Strategy & Budget: manage the marketing budget across channels and identify new growth opportunities (e.g., Google Guarantee, Yelp Ads, Nextdoor, Angi/HomeAdvisor, referrals). What We're Looking For o 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, with direct hands-on experience in the U.S. market (non-negotiable) o Required : hands-on experience marketing for companies in the local or home services industry (moving, HVAC, plumbing, cleaning, landscaping, etc.). This is mandatory, not a preference o Required : hands-on experience with local lead-generation platforms: Google Guarantee, Google Ads, Yelp Ads or similar o Required : working knowledge of call tracking and lead attribution - you should know how to trace a lead back to the channel and campaign that generated it, not just look at platform-reported clicks/impressions o Solid working knowledge of digital advertising channels relevant to local services (Local Service Ads, paid social, etc.) o Experience managing or working closely with outsourced marketing agencies/freelancers: you know how to evaluate their work and aren't dependent on them to understand what's happening o Strong understanding of local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, and review/reputation platforms (especially Yelp) o Comfortable with marketing analytics comparing spend to lead quality and revenue, not just clicks and impressions o Experience with paid social (Meta Ads) is a plus o Familiarity with CRM/lead-tracking tools (SmartMoving experience is a bonus, not required) o Excellent written English; bilingual English/Russian is required o Self-directed: this is a remote role and you'll need to manage your own time and proactively communicate progress What We Offer o Competitive salary, based on experience o Fully remote position o Real autonomy to set strategy and run point on vendor relationships. You won't be micromanaged on execution o Opportunity to build and shape an in-house marketing function from the ground up o Direct collaboration with CEO Please, while applying for the vacancy, kindly have your portfolio with specific numbers and cases attached. Thank you and looking forward to your application!

name: Project Manager
description: We are looking for an Project Manager with a strong commercial mindset and deep understanding of digital advertising performance. In this role, you will lead client campaigns across Telegram, Google, TikTok, and Twitter — owning the full cycle from strategy and communication to optimization, reporting, and financial performance. This is a high-impact position for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, can balance client relationships with business goals, and is ready to take real ownership of campaign results. You will work closely with media buying teams, influence growth opportunities, and help scale campaigns through data-driven decisions and strategic thinking. Your mission is to build long-term client partnerships, drive sustainable campaign performance, and ensure every deal delivers both strong business outcomes and measurable advertising results. If you have experience managing complex advertising campaigns, understand performance marketing metrics, and enjoy combining client management with commercial responsibility — this role is for you. Your impact: Manage end-to-end communication, develop tailored promotion strategies, and identify high-potential traffic channels (Telegram Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, Twitter Business, etc.) Analyze campaign performance, implement data-driven optimizations, and present comprehensive results to clients Collaborate closely with our media buying teams across all traffic sources to ensure alignment with client goals and campaign efficiency Take full responsibility for campaigns financial health, including turnover, margins, budget pacing, and payment cycles Proactively identify client pain points to drive upsells, preparing and pitching compelling commercial proposals Maintain rigorous reporting and ensure smooth end-of-period closures What you bring: 2+ years of successful experience as an Account Manager in a digital advertising agency Solid experience managing complex performance-driven campaigns across Telegram Ads, Google Ads, TikTok and Twitter Hands-on knowledge of major advertising platforms and dashboards Advanced proficiency in Google Analytics, Adjust, and AppsFlyer Mastery of key marketing metrics: CPC, CPM, CPA, CPF, CTR, ROAS, ROI, etc Advanced negotiation skills and high standards of professional business communication Confident Business English at a B2 level or higher What We Offer Fully remote work with flexibility and trust Competitive, market-aligned compensation based on your location, experience, and impact Clear KPIs and a transparent bonus model tied to measurable results Budget for learning and development, including courses, conferences, and professional resources Access to exclusive Telegram Ads inventory and proprietary capabilities, allowing us to scale campaigns without competing with hundreds of agencies for the same placements Space to grow professionally and financially through contribution and results Expanding responsibilities as the company scales Work with visible, measurable impact on real business outcomes Access comprehensive internal and external training programs, plus reimbursement for English language classes Official employment and comprehensive Health Insurance, including dental coverage Regular internal and external team events, workshops, and professional networking opportunities.

name: Senior менеджер по кибербезопасности (OpenStack, ФСТЭК)
description: Ищем специалиста, который уже делал аттестацию ИСПДн в виртуальных средах. Наш кейс — OpenStack (не VMware). Нужно довести облачную IaaS-платформу Trustum до соответствия 152-ФЗ (уровень УЗ-3): от выбора аккредитованной лаборатории до внедрения СЗИ в инфраструктуру. Чем предстоит заниматься: Блок 1. Выбор партнера по сертификации Найти аккредитованную организацию/лицензиата ФСТЭК, которая проведет оценку эффективности или аттестацию. На выходе: сравнение 3–5 КП и рекомендация с кем работать. Блок 2. Разработка ТЗ на проект Сделать gap-анализ текущей инфраструктуры (OpenStack, Ceph, сеть, биллинг) под требования 152-ФЗ.; Подтвердить классификацию УЗ-3 по ПП №1119. Разработать модель угроз по методике ФСТЭК (с учётом multi-tenant: side-channel между тенантами, компрометация гипервизора, инсайдер-админ); Сформировать набор мер по приказу ФСТЭК №21 и пропишете их в ТЗ с привязкой к конкретным компонентам OpenStack. Блок 3. Непосредственное внедрение Подобрать сертифицированные СЗИ (уровня доверия 5–6, без избыточного УД4). Совместно с нашей командой доработать архитектуру: изоляция тенантов (Neutron security groups, VLAN/VXLAN), защита гипервизора KVM/QEMU, шифрование at-rest для Ceph RBD, настройка RBAC Keystone, интеграция аудита всех сервисов в SIEM; Провести установку и настройку СЗИ. Блок 4. Сопровождение до результата Закрыть замечания аттестатора, подготовить пакет ОРД (Политика обработки ПДн, Положение об обработке ПДн, Модель угроз, Акт классификации ИСПДн, Технический паспорт ИСПДн, Регламент реагирования на инциденты, Приказы о назначении ответственных) и быть на связи во время проверок. Кто нам нужен: Опыт самостоятельного ведения проектов приведения в соответствие 152-ФЗ под ключ , включая подбор и взаимодействие с аккредитованными организациями/лицензиатами ФСТЭК, а не только выполнение технической части; Подтверждённый опыт аттестации/оценки эффективности ИСПДн (желательно несколько кейсов именно для облачных/виртуализированных сред, не только коробочных офисных ИС; Знание регуляторики: Знание ПП №1119, приказов ФСТЭК №21 и №17, методик моделирования угроз ФСТЭК (БДУ); Практический опыт сертификации именно с OpenStack (Nova, Neutron, Cinder, Keystone, Glance), а не только VMware/Hyper-V; СЗИ под виртуализацию: Опыт внедрения сертифицированных средств для KVM/OpenStack (vGate, Аккорд или аналоги). Плюсом будет опыт именно для KVM/OpenStack , а не только VMware ESXi; Понимание текущей ситуации с аккредитацией испытательных лабораторий — важно, чтобы выбранные СЗИ имели действующий, а не приостановленный сертификат. Формат сотрудничества: Проектная работа/фриланс; Удалённо/с выездом на площадку для аудита физической инфраструктуры ЦОДа; Оплата обсуждается, по договоренности.

name: Менеджер направления channel-менеджмента
description: О!Привет!Мы ищем специалиста, который будет координировать взаимодействие с channel-менеджерами и помогать выстраивать стабильные операционные процессы между партнёрами и внутренними командами. Чем предстоит заниматься: Сопровождать и развивать работу с действующими channel-партнёрами: выстраивать регулярную коммуникацию, контролировать договорённости, координировать технические и коммерческие вопросы, запуск новых функций и улучшение текущих сценариев работы. Контролировать обмен данными и качество информации по партнёрам: статистика, паритет цен, регулярные сверки, актуальность выгрузок и передаваемых данных. Координировать подключение новых отелей и прямых интеграций через channel-менеджеров, совместно с командой прямых поставок определять приоритеты и потребности бизнеса. Вести операционное сопровождение новых и текущих партнёров: фиксировать статусы, собирать итоги коммуникаций, отслеживать очередь на интеграцию и сроки выполнения задач. Участвовать во внутренних проектах: подготовка аналитических отчётов, развитие базы знаний, настройка регулярного обмена данными и улучшение внутренних процессов. Взаимодействовать с кросс-функциональными командами внутри компании: проектные менеджеры, команда экстранета, коммерческий блок и другие смежные подразделения. От тебя мы ждем: Опыт работы от 2-х лет в смежной роли: channel management, account management, project coordination. Опыт взаимодействия с внешними B2B-партнёрами в travel, OTA, e-commerce. Опыт работы с CRM-системами. Уверенно владеешь Excel. Обладаешь базовыми навыками работы с SQL или готов(а) быстро изучить. Умеешь налаживать и поддерживать деловое общение с партнерами. Умеешь организовывать себя и рабочие процессы, готов(а) брать ответственность и доводить дела до результата. Легко адаптируешься к новым условиям и не теряешься, когда что-то меняется.

name: Sales Manager
description: HRtech is a full-cycle HR platform for companies that are tired of running HR across a messy stack of ATS, HRIS, performance tools, surveys, spreadsheets, and “where do we keep this again?” chaos. We help HR teams manage the full employee lifecycle in one system: from hiring and employee data to performance reviews, surveys, goals, IDPs, and HR analytics. We already have a strong product, paying customers, a clear ICP, and active sales into international IT and digital companies. Now we are growing the sales team and looking for a Full-Cycle Account Executive — someone who can create pipeline, run discovery, demo the product, manage the deal, and close. This is not a role for someone waiting for warm leads. We need someone who can find the right companies, reach the right people, uncover real pain, and turn conversations into signed contracts. What you’ll do Own the full sales cycle: from first touch to signed contract. Identify and reach out to ICP companies through LinkedIn, email, warm intros, events, communities, and other channels. Build your own pipeline and engage HRDs, Heads of Talent, People Ops leaders, COOs, CEOs, and other decision makers. Run discovery calls and product demos. Understand where the customer’s HR processes are breaking: hiring, employee data, performance, analytics, onboarding, engagement, and the usual “we’ll fix it in Excel” situation. Manage deals end to end: follow-ups, objections, pricing discussions, stakeholder alignment, negotiation, and closing. Work with the BDR team. BDRs help strengthen the pipeline and bring in additional leads, but the AE owns their deals and revenue outcome. Run demos that help customers see not just the product, but how HRtech can replace part of their current HR tech stack. Analyze competitor and replacement scenarios: HiBob, BambooHR, Personio, Huntflow, Greenhouse, Lever, Workable, PeopleForce, and others. Help improve our sales playbook: ICP segments, messaging, discovery questions, demo flow, objections, and winning arguments. Who we’re looking for We’re looking for an AE who sells B2B SaaS through business understanding, customer pain, and clear communication — not memorized scripts. You might be a strong fit if you come from SaaS, IT products, HR tech, martech, sales tech, or another B2B software environment, and you know that full-cycle sales means more than joining a call with a warm lead. We need someone who can treat each deal like a small project: from first message to contract. What we expect 3+ years of B2B sales experience, preferably in SaaS, IT, HR tech, or complex B2B software. Experience with outbound sales: LinkedIn, email, personalized messages, follow-up sequences, and cold or semi-warm leads. Ability to create pipeline, not just process inbound demand. Experience managing deals with multiple stakeholders on the customer side. Strong discovery skills. You should be able to uncover real business pain, not just run through a checklist. Ability to sell value, not discounts. Good English level for working with international customers. Ability to quickly understand a broad product and the customer’s business processes. Healthy persistence. Not “message every day until they block you,” but knowing where the deal is stuck and how to move it forward. Nice to have Experience selling HR tech, ATS, HRIS, HCM, people analytics, performance management, or similar products. Experience selling to IT companies or international teams. Understanding of HR processes: recruiting, onboarding, performance reviews, engagement surveys, goals, IDPs, and HR analytics. Experience with tools like HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Clay, Notion, or Slack. Experience selling annual contracts of €20k+ ARR. Experience building your own outbound approach: segments, hypotheses, messaging, testing, and conversion tracking. Who this role is not for Someone who is used to working only with warm inbound leads. Someone who thinks prospecting is “the BDR’s job” and the AE only closes. Someone who needs a large sales enablement team, a dedicated presales team, a scriptwriter, a separate follow-up person, and maybe a shaman just in case. Someone who does not like going deep into the product. HRtech is broad, the market is complex, and our customers are smart. Someone who says they can “sell anything.” We don’t need “anything.” We need someone who can sell a complex product into a specific market. What success looks like After 1 month: you understand the product, ICP, key customer pains, and can run your first discovery/demo calls with support. After 2–3 months: you create your first opportunities, manage your own deals, work with your pipeline, and start closing contracts. After 6 months: you consistently bring in new ARR, generate part of your own pipeline, and understand which segments, pains, and messages convert best. After 12 months: you become one of the key AEs on the team and help shape how HRtech sells, not just how you sell. Conditions Format: full-time Location: remote Compensation: base salary + commission Product: B2B SaaS / HR tech Customers: international IT and digital companies, mid-market, growing teams We’ll discuss the final compensation structure individually. The goal is simple: a strong AE should be able to earn well as the company grows.

name: Associate Project Manager
description: We are seeking an organized and proactive Associate Project Manager to join our team. In this role, you will support our maintenance and support operations by managing incoming service tickets, coordinating technical teamwork, and tracking requests from start to finish. You will play a key role in keeping daily tasks organized, providing regular progress updates to stakeholders, and driving the resolution of client issues. Responsibilities: Manage customer requests and ticket lifecycles across different support channels, creating tasks for the team and providing stakeholders with progress updates. Manage internal team tasks and system errors, prioritizing them based on urgency and technical impact, and organizing the team to work on them. Coordinate technical tasks and team workload, including deployments and platform refreshes, to ensure external agreements are met. Communicate with stakeholders through regular meetings, emails and other channels, while handling task prioritization based on client needs. Work on documentation, including technical proposals, summaries, and reports, coordinating with the team to gather the necessary information. Requirements: Fluent English (C1 preferred) with excellent verbal and written communication skills. At least 1 year of experience in a customer-facing, support, coordination, or operational role involving direct communication with clients or stakeholders. Understanding of support and maintenance processes, ticket lifecycle management, and prioritisation principles in a product, service or IT-related environment. Highly responsible and proactive approach, with the ability to take ownership of tasks and drive client requests to full resolution. Strong organizational, analytical, and time-management skills to evaluate requirements and make informed decisions on priorities. Nice to have: Hands-on experience with project management, issue tracking, and ticketing tools (such as Jira, Service Desk, Intercom, or similar). Understanding of SDLC, Agile framework and principles. Experience working with Salesforce or Salesforce-based environments. Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, and other AI-driven assistants to facilitate and improve project management activities, such as task automation, documentation enhancement, and decision support. Working with us is about: A motivated and highly professional team to work with A modern business center located in Minsk, just a five-minute walk from the subway, or work remotely Working schedule from 11:00 to 20:00 Minsk time Program of bonuses and discounts Fresh fruits available in the office for a healthy work environment Corporate events to foster a team spirit Join us! *вакансия открыта на перспективу.

name: Senior Designer (Art Direction / Creative focus)
description: 🌍 We are hiring: Senior Designer (Art Direction / Creative focus) 📍 Location: Remote 💡 About us Yesim is an international eSIM provider with 7+ years of experience in delivering secure, seamless connectivity anywhere in 200 countries around the world. We specialize in fast, secure, and global connectivity through advanced eSIM mobile solutions for 3+ million active users. Our innovative app allows to manage multiple eSiMs within a single account - allowing users to effortlessly juggle several plans and share connectivity. ✨ About the Role We are looking for a Senior Designer to define and evolve our brand’s visual identity across all channels. This is a role with a strong hands-on component for a specialist who combines brand thinking, a systematic approach, and a passion for experimentation. You will be responsible for brand consistency and evolution, as well as creating high-performing creatives for performance marketing, social media, and product communications. In the long term, the role may include mentoring designers and helping build the team, but the initial focus is on creative quality and developing the visual system. 📝 Responsibilities Brand & Visual System Develop and manage the brand’s visual identity across all channels. Ensure communication consistency across different markets, formats, and languages. Develop and maintain scalable design systems and brand guidelines. Creative Leadership & Execution Set the creative direction for campaigns, advertisements, and content. Create and curate visual materials (static, motion, video). Conduct design reviews and maintain quality control over all creatives. Experiments & Innovation Foster a culture of experimentation (formats, narratives, visual approaches, AI). Collaborate with the marketing team to test and optimize creatives. Implement new tools and methodologies, including AI-driven production. Cross-functional Collaboration Partner with Marketing, Product, and Growth teams. Translate business objectives into effective creative solutions. Synchronize brand identity with the product experience. 📩 Requirements 5+ years of design experience, including experience in an Art Direction or Lead role. A strong portfolio showcasing brand systems, campaigns, and multi-channel design. Deep understanding of visual design: composition, typography, color, and motion. Experience in creating and scaling design systems for marketing/branding. Ability to balance brand consistency with creative experimentation. Hands-on experience with video and motion (Premiere Pro / After Effects / DaVinci). Experience with AI-generated content and tools. Strong understanding of the digital environment (ads, social media, performance channels). Experience in informal leadership (reviews, mentoring) is a plus. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. ⭐️ Nice to have: Experience in fast-growing startups or product-led companies. Experience working specifically with performance creatives. Understanding of marketing metrics and experimental frameworks. Basic 3D skills or a systematic approach to motion design. Experience working with multiple markets and localization. 🌍 Languages Russian: C2 (Native/Fluent) English: B1+ (Intermediate or higher) 🎁 What We Offer 💻 100% Remote work. 🌍 An international team with a strong design culture. 🚀 The opportunity to influence a global brand. 🎨 Real ownership of visual identity and creative direction. 📈 Growth opportunities, including evolving into a formal leadership role. 🤝 An open culture free from bureaucracy. 📩 Please include your portfolio with your application.
