name: Marketing Manager
description: About the role: Founded in 2003, Group-IB is a global cybersecurity company specializing in the prevention and investigation of digital crime. As a Marketing Manager, you will play a key role in driving brand awareness, thought leadership, and commercial growth by planning and executing high-impact regional marketing initiatives focused on the Central Asia market. This role is ideal for a proactive marketer who thrives in a fast-paced, innovative environment and wants to directly influence how the company connects with its audiences and strengthens its market presence. Tasks to solve: Event Marketing Plan, organize, and execute Group-IB’s participation in key industry events, including conferences, webinars, roadshows, and C-level executive gatherings. Coordinate with internal stakeholders and external vendors to ensure seamless event delivery, including logistics, branding, and lead generation. Channel & Partner Marketing Drive engagement with channel partners, resellers, and distributors through co-branded marketing campaigns and partner enablement programs. Launch targeted campaigns to strengthen relationships and increase partner-driven opportunities. Social Media & Content Strategy Develop and own the regional website content strategy, including localization of Group-IB's English-language assets into Russian and the creation of CIS-specific content (blogs, threat actor profiles, case studies, landing pages). Create thought leadership campaigns, case studies, webinars, and multimedia assets that highlight Group-IB’s cybersecurity expertise and success stories. Email Campaigns & Lead Generation Design and deploy email marketing campaigns that generate awareness, nurture leads, and support regional sales teams. Launch campaigns and optimize their performance to maximize engagement, conversion, and ROI. Account-Based Marketing (ABM) Develop and execute personalized ABM campaigns targeting high-value accounts in sectors such as BFSI, telecom, e-commerce, and government. Collaborate closely with sales teams to drive pipeline growth and C-level engagement (strategic list identification, activation programs to reach out to them). Experience with platforms such as 6sense is a strong advantage. Marketing Analytics & Reporting Track and report on marketing performance metrics, including campaign effectiveness, MQLs/SQLs, and ROI. Use insights to present results to stakeholders and refine strategy to improve future campaign outcomes. Requirements: Minimum 3 years of experience in B2B marketing, ideally within the cybersecurity, technology, or SaaS industries. Strong understanding of AI-driven marketing workflows and hands-on experience using AI tools to improve content production, analytics, personalization, campaign execution, and operational efficiency. Proficiency in project/event execution, digital marketing, and content development. Hands-on experience with email marketing tools (e.g., HubSpot, Marketo), social platforms (especially LinkedIn and Telegram), and ABM strategies (experience with 6sense is a plus). Strong analytical skills and a data-driven approach to campaign optimization. English proficiency: minimum B2 level. Excellent copywriting and storytelling abilities are a plus. Why choose Group-IB Your happiness is important to us. We want every single team member to be happy. Continuing professional development. At Group-IB, you can choose from various paths to growth: progress as an expert, advance to a management position, try your hand in another department, relocate abroad, or launch a new business area at Group-IB. A team with extensive international expertise. Do you have experience but are looking for exciting challenges? By choosing us, you will be choosing complex tasks and continuously improving your skills in a fast-growing international company. Globally recognized technologies. Group-IB's offices are located in seven countries and our products and services are sold in 60 countries. What’s more, Gartner, IDC, and Forrester have ranked our technologies among the best in their class. We work with over 450 international partners and about 500 clients. A culture created by each of us. Group-IB’s employees speak many different languages and understand one another. We respect each other's beliefs, share common values, and strive toward the happiness of every employee. Economic stability. Group-IB's sustainable growth helps rapidly develop careers that would take years to progress as far as most other companies. Sounds like you? Apply now!

name: Performance Marketing Manager
description: Performance Marketing Manager Playgram.ai (a brand of Zeroqode) is looking for a creative and data-driven Performance Marketing Manager to spearhead paid user acquisition and lead generation across core advertising channels, driving scalable growth from strategy to execution. Key Responsibilities Paid Acquisition & ROI Optimization: Launch, manage, and scale paid campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, X, and LinkedIn to drive B2B/B2C acquisition for US and European markets. Data-Driven Testing: Manage budgets, track key metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR) via GA and native managers, and continuously test campaign variations to minimize acquisition costs. Creative Ideation & Production: Independently brainstorm, conceptualize, and produce high-converting visual assets, hooks, and copy in two languages, specifically tailored for platforms like LinkedIn and others (utilizing design and AI tools). Requirements Performance Marketing Track Record: Proven experience managing, optimizing, and scaling paid media across major channels (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.), preferably in tech startups. Creative Execution & AI Proficiency: Strong ability to independently brainstorm and create multi-language ad copy and graphics (with a focus on LinkedIn) using AI and design tools. Portfolio / Work Examples: Sharing examples or a portfolio of ad creatives/copy you have previously written or designed is highly preferred (soft requirement). Performance Marketing Manager Компания Zeroqode ищет опытного и креативного менеджера по перформанс-маркетингу для управления платным привлечением пользователей и лидогенерацией, от разработки стратегии до ее реализации. Обязанности: Управление кампаниями и ROI: запуск, ведение и масштабирование рекламы в Google, Meta, TikTok, X и LinkedIn для B2B/B2C сегментов на рынках США и Европы. Аналитика и оптимизация: управление бюджетами, отслеживание метрик (ROAS, CPA, CTR) через GA и рекламные кабинеты, регулярное тестирование связок для снижения стоимости привлечения. Креатив и копирайтинг: самостоятельная генерация идей и создание конвертящих визуалов, хуков и текстов на двух языках под специфику LinkedIn и других платформ (с помощью ИИ и дизайн-сервисов). Требования: Опыт в перформанс-маркетинге: успешный опыт ведения, оптимизации и масштабирования paid media (Google, Meta, LinkedIn и др.), желательно в технологических стартапах. Креативные навыки и ИИ: умение с нуля придумывать концепции и самостоятельно создавать контент/тексты на двух языках (с фокусом на LinkedIn), активно используя инструменты ИИ. Примеры работ: будет плюсом, если вы сможете показать примеры или портфолио рекламных креативов/текстов, которые вы делали ранее.

name: Business Development Manager
description: About Loot We are not hiring a traditional Sales Manager. We're looking for someone who combines: • Business Development • Strategic Partnerships • Market Expansion • Commercial Operations • Launch Management Your mission is to identify new markets, build partnerships, and create new revenue streams. What You'll Do: Source and onboard strategic partners Manage partnerships from first contact to launch Identify and validate new business opportunities Launch new verticals and commercial initiatives Build long-term strategic relationships Work closely with Product, Marketing, and Content teams Drive company growth through new revenue channels Requirements: Must Have: 3+ years in Business Development, Partnerships, Sales, Marketplace Operations, or General Management Proven track record of launching initiatives from scratch Strong understanding of: B2B business models Marketing Product Management E-commerce Fluent English Preferred Experience: Telehealth HealthTech B2B SaaS Fintech E-commerce Regulated industries Success Metrics: New partnerships signed Revenue generated New markets launched New verticals launched Partnership revenue growth Speed of execution Why Join Loot? You'll work directly on revenue-generating campaigns, test cutting-edge AI tools daily, and help shape the future of AI-powered performance marketing.

name: Менеджер по цифровому маркетингу/Digital Marketing Manager, Pakistan
description: Мы заинтересованы в кандидате на роль Digital Marketing Manager, который будет отвечать за привлечение, активацию и удержание клиентов для цифровых кредитных продуктов в Пакистане. Работа удаленная. Основные обязанности: Разрабатывать и реализовывать digital acquisition strategy для краткосрочных кредитных продуктов в Пакистане. Управлять paid acquisition campaigns в Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, programmatic networks и других релевантных digital-каналах. Оптимизировать кампании под выданные займы и качественных клиентов , а не только под лиды, клики или заявки. Улучшать полный funnel: impression, click, registration, application, KYC, approval, disbursement, repayment, repeat loan. Тестировать аудитории, креативы, лендинги, application flows, офферы и клиентские сообщения. Работать с Product, Credit Risk, Finance и Collections teams для улучшения офферов, customer journey, unit economics и качества портфеля. Анализировать качество клиентов по источникам привлечения. Обеспечивать прозрачную, культурно корректную коммуникацию с клиентами на английском и урду. Требования: 5+ лет опыта в digital marketing, включая 2–3 года в fintech, digital lending, banking, microfinance, consumer finance, telecom. Опыт управления бюджетами маркетинга и достижения измеримых результатов. Умение оценивать customer quality и credit performance по acquisition channel. Технические навыки: Google Analytics, Firebase, AppsFlyer, Adjust или аналогичные платформы. Power BI, Tableau, Looker или аналогичные dashboarding tools. Базовое понимание SEO. Ключевые компетенции: Сильное коммерческое и аналитическое мышление. Ответственность за результат. Сильные коммуникативные навыки с топ менеджментом. Свободное владение английским языком.

name: Listing Manager / Менеджер по размещению объектов недвижимости
description: удаленный формат работы. My Holiday Home — управляющая компания в сфере краткосрочной аренды недвижимости в ОАЭ. Сегодня в нашем управлении находится около 100 объектов, и мы продолжаем активно масштабировать бизнес, расширять портфель и усиливать команду. В связи с активным масштабированием бизнеса мы ищем специалиста, который будет отвечать за размещение объектов на площадках, управление листингами, контроль качества объявлений и эффективность каналов привлечения клиентов. Эта роль для того, кому интересно не просто размещать объекты на площадках, а влиять на их эффективность, видимость, количество бронирований и коммерческий результат компании. Основные задачи Размещение и сопровождение объектов на Airbnb, Booking.com, Bayut, Property Finder, Dubizzle и других площадках. Создание новых объявлений и актуализация существующих. Контроль корректности информации об объектах. Обновление фотографий, описаний, цен и доступности объектов. Контроль синхронизации данных между площадками и PMS / Channel Manager. Оперативное выявление и устранение ошибок в размещении объектов. Анализ эффективности объявлений и площадок. Подготовка регулярной отчетности по результатам работы; Взаимодействие с отделом бронирования, операционной командой и revenue-направлением. Наши ожидания Опыт работы с Airbnb, Booking.com, Bayut, Property Finder или аналогичными площадками. Понимание принципов размещения и продвижения объектов недвижимости. Опыт создания и оптимизации объявлений. Опыт работы с PMS и Channel Manager системами. Опыт одновременного ведения большого количества объектов будет преимуществом. Уверенное владение Excel или Google Sheets. Внимательность к деталям и умение работать с большим объемом информации. Понимание того, что качественный листинг должен не только корректно отображаться на площадке, но и приводить к обращениям и бронированиям. Английский язык на рабочем уровне. Будет преимуществом Опыт работы в сфере Holiday Homes или краткосрочной аренды. Опыт работы с платными пакетами Bayut и Property Finder. Понимание показателей загрузки объектов, сезонности и ценообразования. Опыт подготовки аналитической отчетности. Личные качества системность; ответственность; внимательность; инициативность; аналитический склад мышления; самостоятельность; ориентация на результат. Что мы предлагаем Работу в быстрорастущей компании на рынке ОАЭ. Возможность участвовать в масштабировании портфеля объектов и выстраивании процессов. Реальное влияние на результат бизнеса и ключевые показатели направления. Команду, открытую к новым идеям и инициативам. Профессиональное развитие и перспективы роста внутри компании. Конкурентный и прозрачный уровень дохода (обсуждается индивидуально с успешным кандидатом) от 1200 USD. Удаленный формат работы, график 5/2 (выходные сб - вс).

name: Junior/Mid Sales Manager for SMB
description: Junior/Mid Sales Manager for SMB (Remote, Full-Time) Location: Remote Employment: Full-time Language: English – Fluent Experience: From 6 months+ Keepgo is a global mobile internet provider offering innovative products and solutions based on virtual technologies, primarily eSIM. We are looking for a Junior/Mid Sales Manager for SMB to accelerate the growth of Keepgo’s B2B solutions for SMB clients across multiple platforms, including esimba.ai, business.keepgo.com Your main goal will be to drive qualified sales through impactful product demos, trusted client communication, and consultative selling. Most of the time, we provide the leads. Responsibilities: Conduct product demos and meetings with SMB leads to present Keepgo’s B2B solutions and drive deal closures. Communicate with leads through multiple channels, including phone calls, email, whatsapp and online meetings, until successful closure. Develop and demonstrate strong knowledge of Keepgo’s telecom and software products, including esimba.ai, IoT solutions - business.keepgo.com Effectively communicate product features, benefits, and business value to SMB customers. Build trust with customers by understanding their business needs and providing tailored solutions. Support local partners during the sales process by providing product expertise and assisting in closing deals. Maintain consistent follow-up with leads and ensure a professional customer experience throughout the sales cycle. Stay updated on market trends, competitor activities, and developments in the telecommunications and SaaS industries. Collaborate with internal teams to align sales efforts with business goals and customer needs. Requirements: Fluent English - ability to communicate across different accents Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, telecommunications, or related field (or equivalent practical experience) Minimum 6 months of experience in B2B sales and sales software products Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies and digital products Strong negotiation, presentation, and communication skills Ability to build rapport and establish trust with customers Understanding of SMB sales processes and customer relationship management Experience working with CRM systems and sales tools is a plus Experience in telecom, SaaS, or tech industry within CIS markets is a plus What We Offer: Fully remote, long-term role Paid vacation Opportunity to work with international B2B tech products Impact-driven work with measurable results Collaborative and flexible work environment *** Junior/Mid Sales Manager for SMB (удаленно, full-time) Локация: удаленно Занятость: full-time Язык: английский — свободный Опыт: от 6 месяцев+ Keepgo — это глобальный провайдер мобильного интернета, предлагающий инновационные продукты и решения на основе виртуальных технологий, прежде всего eSIM. Мы ищем Junior/Mid Sales Manager for SMB , который станет частью команды Keepgo и поможет развивать наши B2B-решения для SMB-клиентов на платформах esimba.ai, business.keepgo.com Основной фокус - демонстрировать глубокие знания продуктов Keepgo, выстраивать долгосрочные отношения с клиентами и вносить вклад в рост B2B-направления на международных рынках. Преимущественно мы сами обеспечиваем поток лидов. Обязанности: Проводить презентации продукта и переговоры с SMB-клиентами, презентуя B2B-решения Keepgo и сопровождая сделки до успешного закрытия. Коммуницировать с потенциальными клиентами через различные каналы — телефонные звонки, email, whatsapp и онлайн-встречи — на всех этапах продаж до закрытия сделки. Развивать и поддерживать глубокое понимание telecom- и software-продуктов Keepgo, включая esimba.ai, business.keepgo.com Эффективно презентовать SMB-клиентам функциональность продуктов, их преимущества и бизнес-ценность. Выстраивать доверительные отношения с клиентами, понимая их бизнес-потребности и предлагая подходящие решения. Поддерживать регулярную коммуникацию с лидами и обеспечивать высокий уровень клиентского опыта на протяжении всего sales cycle. Следить за рыночными трендами, активностью конкурентов и развитием telecom- и SaaS-индустрии. Взаимодействовать с внутренними командами для синхронизации sales-активностей с потребностями клиентов. Требования: Свободный английский язык - умение коммуницировать с носителями разных акцентов От 6 месяцев опыта в B2B-продажах, желательно в сфере SaaS, telecom или tech-продуктов Техническая грамотность и способность быстро осваивать новые технологии и цифровые продукты Сильные навыки переговоров, презентации и коммуникации Умение выстраивать доверительные отношения с клиентами Понимание SMB sales-процессов и принципов customer relationship management Опыт работы с CRM-системами и sales-инструментами будет преимуществом Опыт работы в telecom, SaaS или tech-индустрии на рынках СНГ будет преимуществом Высшее образование в сфере бизнеса, маркетинга, телекоммуникаций или смежных направлений (либо эквивалентный практический опыт) будет плюсом Мы предлагаем: Полностью удаленную работу Оплачиваемый отпуск Долгосрочное сотрудничество Работу с международными B2B-продуктами Влияние на результат и прозрачные метрики Гибкую и комфортную рабочую среду

name: Project Manager (digital marketing)
description: NinjaPromo (as well as DuckDesign) is the top US digital marketing company dedicated to elevating brands through multi-channel marketing solutions, branding and creative design. We truly care about the products we create, and as a community of skilled professionals, we support one another and value each other's ideas. Our Project Manager is a talented, driven, and collaborative individual. We constantly evolve our methods to stay on the cutting edge of the industry. And working as a project manager provides an opportunity to make an impact and progress the career at an exceptionally high rate. That’s our promise to such a candidate. Planned position, opportunity to make a job offer to two candidates, possibility to start working from June 2026 or even later. Responsibilities: Establish and develop strong long-term relationships with clients: communicate using emails, voice and video calls, provide technical expertise and deliver projects that address their needs; Understand client business specifics and how it operates, guide other employees who will directly report to you; Identify potential issues and problems client business may face to propose solutions to solve them and remove impediments; Analyze and track key projects metrics, manage the work using a CRM system; Prepare reports and invoices, facilitate events (daily meetings, planning, retrospective), weekly kick-off meetings, decision-making sessions; Be responsible for the general client satisfaction, work with all other cross-functional teams on feedback and suggestions to improve the efficiency and build long term growth. Required Skills: Spoken and written English: C1; Strong time management skills; ability to stay focused without outside control; Prior experience with marketing, design projects and Web3 clients will be a plus; Successful experience in management, including management of several clients in parallel, preferably for the US/Canada region; Deep analytical skills; Interpersonal communication skills. We offer all these benefits: flexible hours, remote working, unlimited backing for learning and training. We help each employee set up the conditions to do their best work. While this tends to lead to fantastic achievements and career growth, it also requires a significant commitment. If you pass our screening, we’ll ask you to take on a few tests that assess how you approach unfamiliar problems. If you’re successful with those, we’ll invite you to a series of interviews.

name: Старший менеджер продукта (комплексные решения)
description: Мы ищем опытного продакт-менеджера, который будет работать в Продуктовом блоке развития комплексных решений Обязанности: Исследование рынка и клиентов: Проведение регулярных интервью с конечными клиентами и партнерами-интеграторами. Анализ конкурентов и формирование battle cards. Выявление "болей" и формулировка потребностей, перевод их в продуктовые гипотезы. Формирование продуктовой стратегии и дорожной карты. Разработка и актуализация продуктового видения и стратегии. Приоритизация гипотез и задач на основе данных, анализа ROI и стратегических целей компании (использование методов RICE, WSJF и др.). Работа с командой разработки: Формирование и управление бэклогом продукта (Product Backlog). Написание четких и детализированных технических заданий (User Stories, Use Cases, DoR, DoD). Полный контроль за стадией разработки и сроками её выполнения. Коммуникация и запуск: Подготовка всей необходимой документации: презентации, инструкции, релиз-ноты. Обучение отдела продаж и партнеров по возможностям продукта. Определение ключевых метрик продукта. Требования: ​​​​​​​ Опыт работы на позиции Продакт-менеджера от 3-х лет в B2B-среде. Опыт работы со сложными продажами и/ или через партнерские каналы (channel sales). Понимание мотивации интеграторов, вендоров и конечных заказчиков. Умение работать с данными, строить воронки и оценивать эффективность гипотез. Владение инструментами: Jira/Confluence Понимание основ работы API, REST, принципов интеграции с внешними системами (1С, СКУД, BI-системы). Способность на техническом уровне обсуждать задачи с разработкой. Практическое применение принципов Lean, Jobs-To-Be-Done (JTBD), CustDev. Понимание аппаратной части (железо) и ее взаимосвязи с программным обеспечением. Опыт построения B2B-ценообразования (лицензии, подписка, разовые платежи). Базовое понимание юнит-экономики и финансовых моделей.​​​​​​​

name: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Digital Marketing Specialist to support DHTMLX website marketing, product communications, and online visibility across key channels. This is a hands-on role for someone who can write and edit English marketing copy, coordinate website updates with designers and developers, and use data, research, and AI tools to improve marketing assets and workflows. Responsibilities: Write and edit content across corporate websites. Manage and update product pages, landing pages, CTAs, banners, release/promo pages. Prepare and maintain company profiles on software directories, review platforms, and industry catalogs. Create marketing materials, product descriptions, presentations, and promotional content. Collaborate with designers, developers, content creators, and product managers to produce relevant marketing assets. Support SEO initiatives, including content optimization, and competitor analysis. Monitor website performance and identify opportunities for content improvements. Participate in competitor analysis and market research. Check published pages and materials for accuracy, consistency, formatting, links, and overall quality. Use AI tools to streamline research, content creation, and marketing workflows. Requirements and skills: Excellent written English (Advanced/C1 or higher). At least 2 years' experience in digital marketing, website marketing, content marketing, or a related role. Strong attention to detail and project management skills. Strong research and analytical skills. Basic SEO knowledge and understanding of search engine optimization best practices. Experience managing website content using CMS platforms. Experience working with ChatGPT, Claude, or similar AI tools as part of a daily workflow. The ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with a distributed team. Past experience producing content for the IT industry would be a plus. Experience with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, Semrush, or similar tools would be a plus. We offer: Opportunity for professional self-realization. Friendly and united team. Medical insurance. 29 days of paid vacation. 50% compensation of sports activities. Language course and other corporate programs. Official salary. Please include examples of English-language content you've created (blog posts, case studies, guest posts, or social media campaigns). For examples of the type of content we create, please visit the https://dhtmlx.com/. * The creation of the workplace is planned for the future.

name: Founding Marketing Manager - B2B Growth
description: Creally is an AI-centric creator marketing platform that automates the full influencer pipeline — sourcing, outreach, negotiation, payments, and analytics — for apps and games, ecommerce, edtech and more. We're early-stage, growing fast, and already working with 40+ teams including Lingokids, Glam and many more. The Role You'll own the entire marketing function. No team yet — you'll build one as we grow. That means strategy and execution: you set the direction and you get your hands dirty. We're looking for someone who's done this before at an early-stage B2B SaaS company and thrives in the ambiguity of 1 to 100. Requirements 5+ years in B2B SaaS marketing, with clear ownership of pipeline generation and demonstrated results Proven ability to build and run multi-channel inbound programs that actually move pipeline — not just generate impressions Hands-on experience across: paid (Google/LinkedIn/Meta), SEO, content marketing, comarketing activactions Track record of finding and closing co-marketing or distribution partnerships Experience representing a company at industry events — from planning to execution Familiarity with the mobile apps, gaming, or creator economy space is a strong plus Comfortable with early-stage constraints: limited budget, no big team, high ownership Data-driven — you measure what matters and cut what doesn't Numbers oriented mindset - you measure everything around you to identify gaps Responsibilities End-to-end inbound pipeline generation — from awareness to MQL Paid acquisition SEO and content marketing — building organic pipeline that compounds over time LinkedIn presence and social-driven demand gen Co-marketing and partnership programs — identifying, pitching, and closing distribution partnerships Events — sponsorships, speaking slots, virtual events, and conference presence Marketing ops: tooling, attribution, and reporting Marketing associate - content marketer Conditions Own marketing at a fast-growing AI startup in the booming creator economy space Potential to grow to the leader of the team Direct line to the founder Fully remote, async-friendly culture Salary in USD + equity after probation Apply if you feel this is your place.

name: Revenue-менеджер
description: Обязанности: · Управление доходностью (revenue management) объектов размещения в портфеле компании · Разработка и внедрение тарифных сеток, стратегий динамического ценообразования · Анализ ключевых метрик: RevPAR, ADR, Occupancy, GOPPAR · Мониторинг цен конкурентов и спроса в регионе · Управление каналами продаж · Настройка и контроль работы PMS/CRS · Оптимизация комиссий каналов, повышение доли прямых бронирований · Формирование прогнозов загрузки, бюджетов доходов и регулярная отчётность для руководства Требования: · Опыт в revenue-управлении в гостиничном бизнесе от 2 лет · Опыт работы с PMS, каналами дистрибуции (Channel Manager) · Понимание метрик: RevPAR, ADR, Occupancy, GOPPAR, индекс загрузки · Аналитический склад ума, инициативность, ориентация на прибыль Условия: · Удалёнка · Заработная плата: обсуждается на собеседовании · График работы: свободный · Работа с реальными объектами размещения

name: Kazakh and Russian-Speaking Content Creator
description: Kazakh and Russian-Speaking Content Creator The Role: We are looking for a passionate and self-motivated professional to join our Content team. Your responsibilities will include creating various content that informs and engages our audiences and maintains brand consistency across all online channels. The main responsibilities of the position include: Create engaging content for digital marketing material (such as campaigns, emails, and webpages). Develop captivating and dynamic social media videos while serving as the on-screen representative. Communicate our brand and company values through all our content. Follow specific templates to complete various campaign tasks in a timely manner. Write exciting copy that improves open-rates and click-through-rates (subject lines, titles, webinar descriptions etc.). Develop a thorough understanding of and be able to work within the boundaries of industry regulations, while still producing creative and original content. Work closely with the Regional Marketing team. Main requirements: Degree in Marketing, Journalism, Communications, or a related field At least 3 years of experience in a similar position. Experience in the financial services industry will be considered an advantage. Work portfolio Basic understanding of SEO. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, Russian and Kazakh. Creative and passionate about content creation Ability to deliver high-quality content across multiple digital channels. Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks. High attention to detail. Benefit from: Attractive remuneration package plus performance related reward Intellectually stimulating work environment Continuous personal development and international training opportunities The Hiring Experience: What Awaits You Let’s Connect – Intro Chat with Talent Acquisition Deep Dive – First Interview with Your Future Team Bring It to Life – Role-Specific Take-Home Task Type of employment: Full time

name: Senior Social Media & Outreach Specialist (Lead)
description: The Senior Social Media & Outreach Specialist is responsible for growing Planet VPN’s presence across social platforms and external distribution channels. The role combines hands-on social media management, community building, outreach via portals, and influencer/creator partnerships to drive product visibility and user growth. What You'll Do Social media & community Own Telegram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Instagram, and YouTube: content planning, publishing, tone of voice, and basic analytics. Manage the Telegram channel and bot end-to-end, including automation flows and subscriber engagement. Build and moderate active communities (with a focus on Reddit and Telegram), monitor brand mentions, and handle comments and reviews across platforms. Influencers, creators & partnerships Research and evaluate Telegram channels, YouTube creators, and other relevant partners by audience quality, fit, and pricing. Manage the full partnership cycle: outreach, negotiation, briefing, content review, publication, and post-campaign analysis. Maintain a structured database of active and potential partners and track performance against agreed KPIs. Outreach & product distribution Manage presence on directories and review platforms: accounts, uploads, product info, screenshots, and changelogs. Maintain and expand the list of placement sites, negotiate and secure listings with editors and webmasters, and keep pages up to date. Work with SEO on content relevance. Content, video & collaboration Work closely with content, design, SEO, and video specialists to produce platform-native content for social media and creator integrations. Provide structured briefs and key messages for posts and videos, and repurpose assets across channels in a native way. Contribute to content and messaging experiments (including A/B tests) to improve reach, engagement, and conversions. Performance & AI-driven workflows Define and monitor KPIs for channels, placements, and campaigns, preparing clear, regular reports with insights and next steps. Use AI tools and automation (GPT, agents, outreach tools) to speed up research, content drafting, reporting, and routine operations. Improve internal processes and playbooks for social media, outreach, and influencer marketing. What we are looking for 3+ years of experience in social media marketing, community management, and influencer/partner marketing on Telegram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Instagram, and YouTube. Proven experience managing brand channels and communities, including planning, publishing, and basic performance analysis. Hands-on experience running influencer or creator collaborations end-to-end. Experience with outreach to external platforms (directories, review sites, portals). Strong understanding of how the platforms work: formats, audience behavior, and platform rules. Experience leading and coordinating small teams. English C1 or higher and strong written communication skills. Strong ownership, reliability, and ability to manage multiple workstreams without losing detail. Nice-to-have Proactive use of AI tools and automation to improve speed and quality of work. Experience with SaaS, mobile apps, VPN, cybersecurity, utilities, or other IT products. Experience working with social video formats (YouTube, Shorts, Reels) and their basic performance metrics. What We Offer Build personal AI agents using our premium infrastructure. Absolute freedom to work from any location. (GMT+1– GMT+5) Internal R&D opportunities. Paid time off and sick leave. Direct impact on a massive, world-class B2C product. A collaborative environment with some of the best minds. Hardware upon completion of your probation. If this sounds like you, we’ve been waiting for you! Let’s build the future of digital freedom together.

name: Kazakh and Russian-Speaking Multimedia Designer
description: Kazakh and Russian-Speaking Multimedia Designer The Role: We are seeking a highly creative and versatile Multimedia Designer to join our team in a fast-paced and dynamic environment. In this role, you will be responsible for conceptualizing, designing, and producing engaging multimedia content across a variety of digital channels. Your expertise in 3D design, animation, and multimedia production will play a key role in elevating our brand presence, enhancing user experiences, and driving impactful visual communication. The main responsibilities of the position include: Conceptualize, design, and produce multimedia assets, including videos, animations, and interactive content. Apply strong 3D design and animation using Cinema 4D. Create compelling static and motion visuals for social media, websites, digital ads, email campaigns, product launches, and educational materials. Leverage AI-driven creative tools to enhance efficiency and innovation in image and video production. Produce and edit promotional videos using Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. Utilize Figma for web and UI/UX design projects. Ensure all outputs align with brand guidelines and meet the highest creative standards. Collaborate closely with Content Marketing, UI/UX, and Media Production teams to deliver inspiring design solutions. Stay up to date with design trends, emerging tools, and technologies. Main requirements: BSc/MSc in Multimedia/Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or a related field. At least 3 years of proven experience as a Multimedia Designer, or a similar creative role. Experience in fintech, financial services or online trading will be considered an advantage. In - depth knowledge of Cinema 4D for 3D design and animation. Strong portfolio demonstrating a wide range of high-quality multimedia projects. Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere Pro). Fluent Kazakh and Russian speaker with excellent oral and written skills in English. Experience with AI-based creative tools for image and video production. Knowledge of interactive content and web animations will be considered an advantage. Strong communication skills. Exceptional attention to detail. Highly organized and be able to adapt quickly to changing priorities and thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment by managing multiple projects simultaneously. Benefit from: Attractive remuneration package plus performance related reward Intellectually stimulating work environment Continuous personal development and international training opportunities The Hiring Experience: What Awaits You Let's Connect – Intro Chat with Talent Acquisition Bring It to Life – Role-Specific Take-Home Task Deep Dive – First Interview with Your Future Team Type of employment: Full-time Location: Kazakhstan All applications will be treated with strict confidentiality!

name: Менеджер по развитию B2B продуктов. TravelTech
description: ЧЕМ ТЕБЕ ПРЕДСТОИТ ЗАНИМАТЬСЯ: Развивать b2b-продукт(ы): создавать новые, анализировать эффективность и развивать уже работающие; Отвечать за юнит-экономику и показатели эффективности выпускаемых продуктов и доработок; Взаимодействовать с b2b-пользователями (арендодатели жилья, отельеры, партнёры); Погружаться в операционные процессы и специфику бизнеса краткосрочной аренды жилья и гостиничных услуг; Изучать рынок, исследовать аналогичные продукты, в том числе зарубежные; Формировать и актуализировать бэклог согласно приоритетам компании; Выявлять, описывать бизнес требования, управлять необходимыми изменениями; Составлять пользовательские сценарии, UseCases, UserStories, CJM, Проводить анализ, формировать и поддерживать в актуальном состоянии документацию продукта, Ставить и декомпозировать задачи на разработку; Контролировать соблюдение плановых сроков релиза (2-х недельные спринты, квартальные и годовые OKR); Контролировать соответствие реализации требованиям, сопровождать внедрение и участвовать в приёмке функционала. Выстраивать взаимодействие с бизнесом, командой разработки и другими заинтересованными сторонами для проработки функционала сервиса; Участвовать в проектировании интерфейсов (web / mobile), описывать поведение экранов, логику отображения данных; Участвовать в кросс-командной реализации стратегии компании, постоянно взаимодействовать с отделами: разработки, продаж, аналитики, маркетинга, поддержки для обеспечения успешного внедрения и продвижения продукта; МЫ ОЖИДАЕМ, ЧТО У ТЕБЯ ЕСТЬ: Опыт в TravelTech индустрии и желание расти и развиваться вместе с продуктом и компанией; Опыт работы от 3 лет в роли менеджера по развитию b2b-продуктов или системного аналитика в системе бронирования отелей, крупном бизнес тревел агентстве, channel manager или ОТА (TravelTech, HotelTech); Понимание основных продуктовых метрик и особенностей туристических b2b-продуктов; Знание технологии работы АСУ для гостиничного бизнеса, Экстранета ОТА, channel manager - будет значительным преимуществом; Опыт запуска продуктов или нового функционала «под ключ» - приветствуется; Аналитическое мышление: вам предстоит анализировать большие объемы данных, проводить исследования и принимать решения на основе цифр; Понимание жизненного цикла разработки ПО и практик сопровождения изменений; Английский язык — на уровне, достаточном для понимания технической документации. Самоорганизация, умение работать с большим объёмом информации и приоритизировать задачи; Умение работать в условиях неопределённости, формулировать задачу «с нуля» и самостоятельно выстраивать процесс работы; Уверенные коммуникации: умение обсуждать сложные технические темы понятным языком с командой и заказчиком; Структурность, внимательность к деталям и стремление к качеству. МЫ ПРЕДЛАГАЕМ: Интересный и востребованный на рынке продукт; Работу в стабильной успешной компании, сервисы которой выбирают миллионы пользователей; Сильную команду профессионалов; Сложные и амбициозные задачи; Возможность лично влиять на развитие популярного HotelTech продукта и отвечать за результат; Достойную заработную плату (сумма обсуждается индивидуально), ДМС со стоматологией; Удаленный формат работы (UTC+3); Комфортную атмосферу, гибкие и прозрачные рабочие процессы без лишней бюрократии; Возможность вертикального и горизонтального профессионального роста.

name: MS Dynamics 365 CRM Developer
description: Andersen is hiring a MS Dynamics 365 CRM Developer for a project modernizing a banking CRM platform and enhancing digital customer services through scalable solutions. The customer is a financial institution operating in the banking sector and providing a wide range of services for corporate, institutional, and individual clients. Its activities cover corporate banking, investment solutions, treasury services, asset management, capital markets, and digital banking products. The company supports businesses and organizations across different markets, with a focus on reliable financial services, long-term client relationships, innovation, and the development of modern banking technologies. The project is focused on modernizing a retail banking platform with a primary focus on the CRM ecosystem supporting digital banking products and customer application processes. It includes enhancing a highly customized Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM solution, optimizing integrations and business workflows, and improving scalability and customer experience. Responsibilities: Designing, developing, and customizing Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM applications to meet business requirements. Implementing and maintaining plugins, workflows, business rules, and custom integrations. Collaborating with business analysts and architects to translate business needs into technical solutions. Ensuring seamless integration with core banking systems, payment gateways, and other enterprise applications. Optimizing existing CRM processes, enhancing data integrity, and improving user experience. Participating in code reviews, solution design discussions, and quality assurance processes. Preparing and maintaining technical documentation, deployment guides, and releasing notes. Supporting ongoing maintenance, performance tuning, and troubleshooting of Dynamics 365 environments. Working closely with the KSA-based project management team to ensure deliverables align with project milestones and SLAs. Must-haves: Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM development for 3+ years. Experience with Dynamics 365 CRM 9.x, preferably on-premise implementations. Strong knowledge of CRM customization, configuration, entities, forms, views, dashboards, business rules, and security roles. Hands-on experience with Business Process Flows, complex business scenarios, custom statuses, transitions, and approval flows. Strong experience developing and maintaining workflows, plugins, custom messages, custom actions, and server-side CRM extensions. Experience with C#, .NET, JavaScript, CRM SDK, Web API, and plugin registration tools. Experience integrating Dynamics 365 CRM with internal and external systems. Strong understanding of enterprise-level CRM solutions with high transaction volume and large customer bases. Ability to troubleshoot, debug, optimize, and maintain complex CRM implementations. Good communication skills and ability to work with business stakeholders, analysts, integration teams, QA engineers, and other technical teams. Level of English – from Intermediate+ and above. Nice-to-Have: Experience in banking, retail banking, lending, credit cards, personal finance, or asset application systems. Experience with Dynamics 365 CRM on-premise environments in large enterprise organizations. Experience with high-load CRM systems supporting hundreds of thousands of active customers and large daily transaction volumes. Experience with integrations through middleware platforms and business layers for digital channels. Knowledge of STP, DST, NST, staff-related workflows, or similar banking process flows. Experience with Qarar, decision engines, SI middleware, VBL business layers, or channel integrations for iOS, Android, and internet banking portals. Experience with performance tuning, CRM scalability, data migration, and production support. Knowledge of security, compliance, auditability, and regulated banking environments. Reasons why this job would be interesting to you: Experience in teamwork with leaders in FinTech, Healthcare, Retail, Telecom, and others. Andersen cooperates with such businesses as Samsung, Siemens, Johnson & Johnson, BNP Paribas, Ryanair, Mercedes, TUI, Verivox, Allianz, T-Systems, etc.. The opportunity to change the project and/or develop expertise in an interesting business domain. Job conditions – you can work both fully remotely and from the office or can choose a hybrid variant. Guarantee of professional, financial, and career growth! The company has introduced systems of mentoring and adaptation for each new employee. The opportunity to earn up to an additional 1,000 USD per month, depending on the level of expertise, which will be included in the annual bonus, by participating in the company's activities. Access to the corporate training portal, where the entire knowledge base of the company is collected and which is constantly updated. Bright corporate life (parties / pizza days / PlayStation / fruits / coffee / snacks / movies). Certification compensation (AWS, PMP, etc). Referral program. Private health insurance and compensation for sports activities. Join us!

name: Техлид команды (Tech Lead)
description: iQStore (ООО «АЙ КЬЮ СТОР») – российская ИТ-компания, вендор-разработчик программных продуктов для коммуникации с клиентами. Наши решения позволяют организовать омниканальные связи бизнеса с клиентами и автоматизировать обслуживание с использованием технологий искусственного интеллекта. 14 лет исследований и разработок 50+ довольных клиентов 150+ реализованных проектов Среди клиентов компании крупнейшие банки, телекоммуникационные, финансовые и другие организации, как на рынке РФ, так и за ее пределами. Компания входит в крупнейший ИТ-консорциум «ideas Consulting and Management Group» (iCAM Group), решения которого занимают лидирующие позиции на рынке РФ. О продуктах компании: Основным продуктом компании является платформа iQChannels — омниканальная бизнес-платформа для обслуживания клиентов во всех цифровых каналах (email, веб приложениях, мобильных приложениях, мессенджерах, социальных сетях и голосовых ассистентах). iQChannels позволяет коммуницировать и обслуживать клиентов, как с участием операторов/менеджеров, так и в полностью автоматизированном режиме с использованием технологий искусственного интеллекта (с применением чат-ботов). Продукты-модули расширяющие возможности платформы iQChannels : iQWiki – интерактивная база знаний, интегрированная в бизнес-процесс обслуживания клиентов и персонала. iQBot – low-code платформа для создания классических чат-ботов на базе технологий машинного обучения. iQGPT – платформа для создания ИИ-агентов и ИИ-ассистентов на базе технологий генеративного искусственного интеллекта. iQCopilot – это модуль платформы iQChannels, который расширяет ее возможности ИИ-копилотом работника контакт-центра. iQAssistant – это модуль платформы iQChannels, который расширяет ее возможности ИИ-ассистентом для персонала. Все продукты компании построены на современном технологическом стеке, специально адаптированным для высоконагруженных онлайн систем. Решения компании обеспечивают надежность и высокий уровень защиты информации, что в свою очередь является первостепенными критериями при выборе платформы, особенно в финансовых организациях. Узнать подробнее о компании и продуктах можно на сайте iqstore.ru. Техлид команды (Tech Lead) Компания iQStore расширяет производственные мощности и ищет опытного техлида-разработчика, способного возглавить команду и активно участвовать в развитии продуктов. Нам нужен опытный специалист, готовый развивать производственную команду, улучшать архитектуру продуктов и участвовать в развитии производственных процессов. Мы ориентируемся на высокие стандарты качества кода и инновационные технические решения. Почему именно iQStore? iQStore — аккредитованная ИТ-компания, входящая в крупнейший ИТ-консорциум и демонстрирующая уверенный рост. Мы создаем и развиваем востребованные продукты для крупного бизнеса на базе технологий будущего: искусственного интеллекта и цифровых сервисов. Мы стремимся постоянно повышать качество сервиса, внедрять инновации и предоставляем отличные возможности для профессионального роста. Обязанности Формирование и реализация технической стратегии развития продукта. Проектирование архитектуры, выбор технологий и инструментов. Контроль качества кода, проведение код-ревью, внедрение стандартов разработки. Организация и развитие процессов CI/CD, автоматизации тестирования, управления техническим долгом. Решение сложных технических задач, устранение критических проблем. Менторство и развитие команды, обучение сотрудников, проведение технических встреч и воркшопов. Коммуникация с бизнесом: перевод бизнес-требований в технические задачи, объяснение технических аспектов нетехническим специалистам. Участие в планировании, оценке и декомпозиции задач, контроль сроков и качества реализации. Требования Основные требования Глубокое знание языка Go (Golang): идиомы языка, многопоточность (goroutines, channels), работа с сетью (TCP/IP, работы websockets), REST/gRPC, оптимизация производительности. Экспертное владение Angular (включая RxJS, NgRx/Store, маршрутизация), понимание принципов SPA и современных подходов к фронтенд-разработке. Опыт работы с реляционными и нереляционными базами данных (PostgreSQL, MongoDB и др.). Навыки работы с системами контейнеризации (Docker) и оркестрации (Kubernetes). Понимание принципов CI/CD, опыт настройки пайплайнов сборки и деплоя. Опыт проектирования и реализации масштабируемых, отказоустойчивых архитектур. Опыт проведения код-ревью, внедрения стандартов качества кода. Системное мышление, умение видеть проект как целостную систему. Умение принимать архитектурные решения и аргументировать их. Личностные качества Лидерские качества, умение вдохновлять и мотивировать команду. Развитые коммуникативные навыки, способность объяснять сложные вещи простым языком. Эмпатия, умение работать с разными типами людей, разрешать конфликты. Проактивность, ответственность за технический результат команды. Готовность к наставничеству и развитию коллег. Будет плюсом Опыт работы в роли архитектора или ведущего разработчика в крупных проектах. Понимание бизнес-процессов и продуктового подхода. Опыт публичных выступлений, написания технической документации. Условия Официальное трудоустройство согласно Трудовому кодексу РФ. Ежеквартальные премий по результатам работ. Гибкий график работы (удалённый или гибридный формат). Дружная команда единомышленников и широкие возможности для личностного и профессионального роста. Современный технологический стек и интересные задачи, направленные на постоянное развитие и инновации. Присоединяйся к нашему проекту и стань частью команды, создающей будущее цифровых коммуникаций!

name: B2C Regional Sales Lead (Mexico) / Руководитель группы продаж (Мексика)
description: Novakid is an English language school for children 4-12 years old, which allows children to remotely learn a foreign language according to a teaching program that meets European CEFR standards on an equal footing with their English-speaking peers (Novakid teachers are native speakers from the US, UK and other countries). We are an advanced B2C EdTech IT company of 450+ professionals. The Role: We are seeking a results-driven B2C Sales Team Lead to build, mentor, and lead our remote sales team in Mexico. You will be responsible for the entire sales cycle, from lead generation to conversion, driving revenue growth, and implementing scalable sales processes. This is a unique opportunity to shape the commercial success of a star region. Join us to lead our sales efforts in Mexico! You will: Provide Sales Leadership; Identify and implement opportunities for process automation and optimization, with a focus on scalability and driving significant growth; Take charge of growing our business in Mexico You have: Relevant B2C sales leadership work experience of 3+ years in remote distributed teams, preferably online sales. Hands-on B2C sales experience; Excellent understanding of online sales channels and digital marketing in the region; Strong analytical skills to provide for data based decisions; Proficiency in CRM systems and passion for using AI tools; English and Spanish languages should both be not lower than C1 (spoken and written). We offer: 100% remote work from any location. We are experts in managing distributed teams; Flexible working hours, not less than 40 hours per week; Options program available; A promising and innovative project in the thriving EdTech sector. Novakid — это онлайн-школа английского языка для детей 4–12 лет. Наша программа обучения соответствует европейским стандартам CEFR и позволяет детям дистанционно осваивать иностранный язык наравне со сверстниками из англоязычных стран (преподаватели Novakid — носители языка из США, Великобритании и других стран). Мы — прогрессивная B2C EdTech IT-компания, объединяющая более 450 профессионалов. Роль: Руководитель группы продаж Мы ищем нацеленного на результат руководителя группы продаж в секторе B2C, который займется формированием, развитием и управлением нашей удаленной командой продаж в Мексике. Вы будете отвечать за весь цикл продаж — от генерации лидов до конверсии, обеспечивая рост выручки и внедряя масштабируемые процессы продаж. Это уникальная возможность напрямую повлиять на коммерческий успех одного из наших самых перспективных регионов. Присоединяйтесь к нам, чтобы возглавить продажи в Мексике! Ваши обязанности: Осуществлять лидерство и стратегическое управление командой продаж; Находить и внедрять возможности для автоматизации и оптимизации процессов с упором на масштабируемость и обеспечение значительного роста; Отвечать за развитие и рост нашего бизнеса в Мексике. Требования к кандидату Релевантный опыт работы на руководящей должности в сфере B2C-продаж от 3 лет в удаленных распределенных командах (предпочтительно в сфере онлайн-продаж); Практический опыт личных B2C-продаж; Отличное понимание каналов онлайн-продаж и цифрового маркетинга в данном регионе; Сильные аналитические навыки для принятия решений на основе данных; Уверенное владение CRM-системами и интерес к использованию инструментов ИИ (AI); Владение английским и испанским языками на уровне не ниже C1 (как устно, так и письменно). Что мы предлагаем: 100% удаленная работа из любой точки мира (мы эксперты в управлении распределенными командами); Гибкий график работы (не менее 40 часов в неделю); Доступ к опционной программе компании; Перспективный и инновационный проект в активно развивающемся секторе EdTech. ​​​​​​​

name: PR Specialist
description: Magnetto.com is a global digital marketing agency and the largest direct seller of Telegram Ads. We help brands around the world launch and scale data-driven advertising campaigns — fast, transparent, and measurable. With 4+ years of experience, 10K+ successful campaigns, and proprietary AdTech solutions, we help global brands scale efficiently across FinTech, Blockchain, Crypto, Gaming, Apps, Real Estate, e-Commerce, Education, and other fast-moving industries across multiple markets, with a strong focus on LATAM, MENA, and Asia, while actively expanding into other regions. We are looking for a proactive PR Specialist to join our fast-paced team. In this role, you will be the driving force behind our brand presence, crafting compelling narratives and building strong relationships with global media. This is an opportunity for a strategic thinker who knows how to turn industry expertise into high-impact PR campaigns and measurable lead generation. You will take full ownership of our media relations, brand voice, and industry positioning, ensuring our innovations stay at the forefront of the digital marketing conversation. Your impact: Develop and implement a comprehensive global PR strategy to elevate the company brand Build and maintain a robust network of loyal media contacts and journalists Write and distribute diverse PR content, including press releases, expert columns, in-depth interviews, and commentary Shape and refine the company brand voice across all communication channels Create high-impact brand and pre-sale materials to support business development Coordinate the company’s presence and participation in key industry events and conferences Drive lead generation through strategic content marketing, collaborations, and noteworthy news hooks Set up and manage email marketing campaigns, automations, and sequences in collaboration with the marketing team Monitor brand mentions and proactively manage our reputation across media platforms Track PR campaign performance and provide regular reports on key metrics and visibility What you bring: 2+ years of experience in PR, specifically within digital, tech, gaming, or startup environments Advanced English proficiency at a C1 level or higher Proven ability to write and edit high-quality professional content in English Strong networking skills with a track record of pitching and securing media placements Experience creating professional presentations and commercial proposals Hands-on experience with modern marketing and PR tools Fundamental understanding of SEO, digital analytics, and content marketing principles What We Offer Fully remote work with flexibility and trust Competitive, market-aligned compensation based on your location, experience, and impact Clear KPIs and a transparent bonus model tied to measurable results Budget for learning and development, including courses, conferences, and professional resources Access to exclusive Telegram Ads inventory and proprietary capabilities, allowing us to scale campaigns without competing with hundreds of agencies for the same placements Space to grow professionally and financially through contribution and results Expanding responsibilities as the company scales Work with visible, measurable impact on real business outcomes Access comprehensive internal and external training programs, plus reimbursement for English language classes Official employment and comprehensive Health Insurance, including dental coverage Regular internal and external team events, workshops, and professional networking opportunities.

name: Outreach Marketing Specialist (Listing specialist)
description: Join a fast-growing cybersecurity company specializing in world-class privacy and security solutions. Operating as a fully remote global team, we are on a mission to protect digital lives and ensure anonymity for millions worldwide. We are vocal advocates for civil rights, digital freedom, and an uncensored online culture. We are looking for an experienced Outreach Marketing Specialist who thrives on solving complex challenges and is ready to make a massive impact on a high-traffic product at the intersection of security, massive scale, and digital freedom. What you will do: Distributing the product through software portals and review platforms by managing accounts, uploading builds, and keeping all product information current (descriptions, screenshots, changelogs, download links) Maintaining and expanding the existing database of placement sites, identifying new relevant directories and platforms Communicating with portal administrators, site editors, and webmasters to secure and maintain product listings Drafting technical briefs for guest post content, coordinating with copywriters, and reviewing final materials for quality and accuracy Analyzing link donors using Ahrefs (traffic, spam score, content relevance, domain authority) Monitoring ratings and moderating user comments on pages featuring the product Collaborating closely with the SEO and content teams to align messaging and distribution priorities Researching and identifying relevant channels on Telegram and other channels, and YouTube creators aligned with our product and target audiences Managing the full deal cycle with influencers: outreach, negotiation, briefing, content review, and publication Tracking placement results and evaluating campaign performance against agreed KPIs Maintaining a structured CRM of active and prospective partners Applying AI tools and agents to streamline workflows, optimize time to market, and improve research efficiency What we are looking for: Experience with SaaS, mobile apps, or IT products is a strong plus 2+ years of hands-on experience in digital content, outreach, linkbuilding, influencer marketing Practical experience with Ahrefs or similar SEO/analytics tools Passion for routine automation with AI, familiarity with AI-assisted workflows (ChatGPT, automation tools, etc.) English proficiency at B2 level Confident working with spreadsheets and structured databases for tracking and reporting Strong attention to detail, ability to manage multiple placements simultaneously without dropping the ball What We Offer: Build personal AI agents using our premium infrastructure. Absolute freedom to work from any location. (GMT+1– GMT+5) Internal R&D opportunities. Paid time off and sick leave. Direct impact on a massive, world-class B2C product. A collaborative environment with some of the best minds. Hardware upon completion of your probation. If this sounds like you, we’ve been waiting for you! Let’s build the future of digital freedom together.

Deep understanding of modern SEO principles and the evolving landscape of AI-driven search. Proven ability to craft a wide variety of content formats – from comprehensive long-reads and targeted short texts to engaging social media posts – with a clear understanding of the strategic nuances between each format. Strong product and UX writing skills, delivering clear, user-centric copy for mobile applications, website interfaces, user dashboards, and transactional elements. Hands-on experience developing diverse promotional copy, including paid search ads, keyword-driven campaigns, video scripts, and marketing creatives. Hands-on experience working directly within modern CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress). name: Lead Generation Specialist
description: At Claro Data Solutions we are seeking a Lead Generation Manager who has the drive to deliver sustained growth and a proven track record of closing high-value contracts. This role is all about building sharp, multi-channel strategies to engage, qualify, and nurture leads. What you’ll do: Outreach Strategy Planning & Execution Research and identify potential leads through social media, online research, AI tools, and other platforms such as Apollo and Coldy.ai. Qualify leads based on their potential data needs and alignment with our services. Create and execute targeted messaging to engage prospects via email, phone calls, and digital campaigns. Maintain consistent communication with leads, nurturing relationships throughout the pipeline to close deals effectively. Analysis & Reporting Monitor and analyze lead generation metrics to evaluate campaign performance and identify areas for improvement. Stay updated on industry trends and emerging tools to enhance lead generation strategies. Provide regular reports and actionable insights to the management team on lead generation performance and outcomes. What we're looking for from you: Experience in B2B lead generation or outbound sales, ideally in the Americas, Asia, or the EMEA region; however, it is not essential. Ability to learn fast and master a new domain to generate custom leads. High proficiency in English, both written and spoken (B2-C1). Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Enthusiasm and being driven by targets and KPIs. Lean approach to workflow management Nice-to-haves: Experience working autonomously in a fast-paced environment. Familiarity with the data industry.

name: Hospitality Software IT Specialist (Bishkek)
description: HRS Hotel Restaurant Systems is the company with an excellent reputation for service. With a team of experts, HRS is a leading supplier of IT solutions for the hospitality industry. We offer a wide range of innovative solutions, including Property Management, POS, Spa & Guest Activities, Business Analytics, Payment Gateway, Mobile Applications, Channel Manager, Online Distribution Services, Finance and HR Systems, Passport Scanning & Recognition, plus much more. About the role You will join our growing global service delivery team implementing and offering support on the HRS-wide portfolio of products to hospitality-related companies across Kazakhstan. The ideal candidate will be ambitious, customer oriented, passionate about digital transformation within the hospitality industry through innovative technologies and software. Requirements IT background is a must SQL knowledge is a must Knowledge of programming languages is preferable Knowledge of how to install programs/OS Ready to travel and sometimes working the night shifts. Open minded, eager to learn new knowledge in inventory management and IT. What you will be doing Software installation (Spa and Hospitality industry) Business Travel up to 50% Rare night shifts Provide telephonic / remote / onsite support for IT products, QA skills advantageous. Ensure accurate and timely updates of logged support issues on the in-house call logging system. Research and test problems to confirm, isolate and identify root cause and propose/document resolutions/future mitigation Assist with the occasional implementation, testing and writing of documentation Test and troubleshoot new versions prior to release. Prioritize numerous issues of varying severity & service levels and deal with them accordingly. Log and manage support cases with 3rd parties. Language requirements: English, both written and spoken, B1+ level What we offer you Multinational enthusiastic environment. Motivating remuneration package. Wide opportunities for professional growth within our fast-growing company; Hybrid working model.

name: Go Architect / Solution Architect (Go)
description: Andersen is hiring a Go Architect / Solution Architect (Go) for a project building a scalable distributed platform focused on high performance, reliability, and efficient concurrency for complex business operations. Our customer is an international organization operating in the financial and protection services domain. The company provides a diverse portfolio of customer-oriented solutions across multiple business areas and markets. With a strong focus on digital capabilities, operational excellence, and long-term development, the organization continuously invests in technology, process improvement, and service innovation to support evolving customer and business needs. The project focuses on building and evolving a high-performance, scalable distributed platform designed to support complex business operations and rapid product growth. The system is developed in Go, with a strong emphasis on efficient concurrency models, reliability, and long-term maintainability. Responsibilities: Designing and evolving scalable distributed systems in Go, choosing appropriate concurrency models and ensuring a balance between performance and maintainability. Collaborating with Product Managers to refine high-level business goals into actionable technical plans and delivery roadmaps. Anticipating and highlighting edge cases, risks, and technical constraints early in the planning phase to avoid issues during implementation. Representing the engineering team in meetings with external stakeholders, explaining technical topics in clear, business-centric terms and challenging unrealistic requirements. Leading and performing code reviews for other senior engineers, ensuring high standards for code quality, resilience, and reliability. Driving improvements in CI/CD pipelines and engineering processes, helping the team ship high-quality code faster and safely. Must-haves: Strong experience in Go development, building scalable and high-performance backend systems for 7+ years. Proven experience in leading and coordinating multiple development teams, driving Go implementations, and ensuring architectural consistency and successful project delivery for 3+ years. Strong experience with Golang, including designing and developing scalable, distributed backend systems. Solid understanding of concurrency patterns in Go, including goroutines, channels, and synchronization primitives. Proven experience in system design with a focus on performance, scalability, reliability, and maintainability. Hands-on experience with CI/CD tools and pipelines, such as GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or similar solutions. Level of English – from Upper-Intermediate and above. Reasons why this job would be interesting to you: Experience in teamwork with leaders in FinTech, Healthcare, Retail, Telecom, and others. Andersen cooperates with such businesses as Samsung, Siemens, Johnson & Johnson, BNP Paribas, Ryanair, Mercedes, TUI, Verivox, Allianz, T-Systems, etc.. The opportunity to change the project and/or develop expertise in an interesting business domain. Job conditions – you can work both fully remotely and from the office or can choose a hybrid variant. Guarantee of professional, financial, and career growth! The company has introduced systems of mentoring and adaptation for each new employee. The opportunity to earn up to an additional 1,000 USD per month, depending on the level of expertise, which will be included in the annual bonus, by participating in the company's activities. Access to the corporate training portal, where the entire knowledge base of the company is collected and which is constantly updated. Bright corporate life (parties / pizza days / PlayStation / fruits / coffee / snacks / movies). Certification compensation (AWS, PMP, etc). Referral program. Private health insurance and compensation for sports activities. Join us!
